title: Problem with uninstall apps- will be fixed soon!
excerpt:
Hi community! 
It just occurred to us that we are experiencing problems uninstalling apps. 
The tech team is working on that and it should be fixed in the next few hours.

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!

It just occurred to us that we are experiencing problems uninstalling apps.
The tech team is working on that and it should be fixed in the next few hours.

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml: It was fixed!
